title: hieracium pallidum subsp. arcicola
intro: Hieracium pallidum subsp. arcicola, also known as pale hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion-like genus Hieracium. This plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium pallidum subsp. arcicola include its potential to support wound healing, reduce inflammation, and alleviate digestive issues. Traditional herbal preparations of pale hawkweed include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to make topical creams or salves for skin and wound care.
